Fallow

Continuous metrics for the fallow codebase

Benchmarks

Performance regression tracking. Measures parse speed and full pipeline throughput across commits.

View charts →

Allocations

Memory allocation tracking. Monitors total bytes allocated, allocation count, and peak memory per analysis run.

View charts →

Coverage

Test coverage percentage over time, computed from LLVM source-based coverage instrumentation.

View charts →

Real-World Benchmarks

Daily performance tracking on 8 real-world open-source projects. Measures cold and warm cache analysis times and peak memory.

View charts →

Conformance

Daily agreement rate between fallow and knip on 8 real-world open-source projects. Tracks detection parity over time.

View charts →
GitHub · Tracked by github-action-benchmark
